block_02: Do all successful traders share certain key principles?
block_03:
Trading expert Michael Hodges believes they do and
he’s ready to share those principles with you.
block_05: “When related to trading Consistency means using a system that includes fundamental analysis, technical entry points and money management but not just using it, using it every trade.”
block_07: “Successful traders always start with the mechanics of trading. Without the proper understanding of how your trading platform works it is possible you will miss out on trades, enter them too late, or worse, trade to much money or too much leverage without realizing it.”
block_09: “The fundamentals are the underlying conditions that make up the market. If you don’t know the conditions, then you are likely to
block_11: If you read the charts wrong, you are likely to get your trade wrong.”
